prompt: An anime-style movie poster featuring a bright, energetic high school girl in the foreground and a quiet high school boy in the background. The girl has long dark purple hair adorned with ribbons and musical note clips, wearing a white short-sleeved school uniform shirt, a dark plaid skirt, and a striped ribbon tie. She is smiling warmly and reaching forward, handing a piece of paper to the viewer that reads この歌、あなたと、未来で届けたいです…♡. In the background, the boy sits at a desk, leaning his head on his hand with an aloof expression. He has messy dark hair, wears a dark blazer over a white hoodie, and has headphones around his neck. The setting is a sunlit room equipped for music production, featuring two computer monitors displaying audio waveforms, a microphone, and a keyboard. The scene features bright, cinematic lighting with lens flares and sparkling effects. Prominent text overlays include large vertical catchphrases on the left reading 億再生 秘密 初恋 運命の歌 in pink and blue, a massive stylized main title 放課後ミリオンノート in the lower center with sparkling gradients, and a subtitle 〜陰キャの僕が億再生ボカロPだと、歌い手志望のお嬢様だけが知っている〜 just below it. A dense block of movie credits sits at the very bottom alongside a logo reading STELLA FILM THEATER.
